children.name: 1. Test Case ID: jFwLiq  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/sentry/allOf/0:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Frontend configuration for Sentry.",             "required": [                 "dsn"             ],             "properties": {                 "dsn": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^https?://"                 },                 "release": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "A version of the code deployed to an environment.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"                 },             // Output truncated...         }      Value:          null  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema
